parityMeta.describes: SmartReplacement parity — a currentExercise whose explicit alternativePriorities force all four SmartReplacementPriority values in one golden: db-bench-press=primary, machine-chest-press=secondary, incline-db-press=angle_variation, cable-fly=avoid. The controlled 4-priority coverage anchor (robust to exercise-library drift).
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic SmartReplacementParams. buildSmartReplacementRecommendations is clockless (no Date.now / Math.random), so generatedAtPolicy is 'none' — no deterministic clock is threaded. Explicit alternativeIds + alternativePriorities are spread last in mergeExercise, so they win over the bench-press knowledge override and deterministically map via mapExplicitPriority (priority/secondary/angle/avoid).
